page_title: Tamashii no Rufuran/-THANATOS-IF I CAN'T BE YOURS- (single)
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-3122, it was released on 24 May 2006. https://vgmdb.net/album/35757 It was released as part of Evangelion's tenth anniversary.

Tracklist

Staff

Track-01
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi

Track-02
Lyrics: MASH
Composition: Shirō Sagisu
Arrangement: Shirō Sagisu
Vocal: LOREN & MASH

Track-03
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi
